name: Caramel Mallow Roll-up
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the caramels, half and half, and butter in a 1 1/2 quart heavy saucepan.
2. Place over heat and stir until the caramels are melted.
3. Stir in the confectioners sugar.
4. Remove from heat. Spread the caramel mixture on buttered wax paper to make a 16x5 inch rectangle.
5. Place marshmallows, end to end, along one side of the rectangle.
6. Roll up, starting with the marshmallow side, by lifting with waxed paper.
7. Spread nuts on waxed paper; coat the roll with them.
8. Wrap in waxed paper.
9. Chill for several hours.
10. To serve, cut into 1/2 inch slices.
Makes 1 (16") log, or about 32 pieces.
